name: Support Ticket
about: Log a support request for tracking and public user visibility
title: "[Ticket]: "
labels: 'support'
assignees: ''
---

### 🚦 Current Status
* **Status:** <!-- Options: 🔴 Blocked | 🟡 Investigating | 🟢 Resolved -->
* **Severity:** <!-- Please reference severity matrix. Options: 🟣 Sev 1 (Outage) | 🔴 Sev 2 (Core Blocked) | 🟠 Sev 3 (Workaround) | 🟡 Sev 4 (Minor) | 🔵 Sev 5 (Enhancement) -->
* **Next Step:** <!-- What is the next step? -->

---

### 📝 Issue Summary
**Reported By:** [User First Name / Initial]  
**Impact:** [e.g., Cannot submit student review, unable to log in, etc.]

**What is happening:**
<!-- Paste the core of the user's email or description here so they can see you captured their exact problem. -->

**Steps to reproduce:**
<!-- How to reproduce the issue, or the steps that led to the issue arising -->

---

### 🛠️ Technical Details (For Engineering)
* **Browser/Device:** [e.g., Chrome on Windows]
* **Page/URL:** [e.g., /evaluations/new]
* **Console Errors:** [Paste logs or screenshots here]
* **Reproducible:** [Yes / No / Needs Info]

---

### 💬 Resolution Log
* *Leave blank upon creation. Add comments below as the fix progresses, and summarize the final fix here when closing the issue.*
